channel.title: Wordpress on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt
channel.description: Recent content in Wordpress on Robert Akhmerov | v31dt

item.title: CVE-2026-25471: WordPress Admin Safety Guard Authentication Bypass
item.description:
Context

I discovered and responsibly disclosed CVE-2026-25471, a high-severity authentication bypass vulnerability in the WordPress Admin Safety Guard plugin by Themepaste. The issue affects vulnerable versions of the plugin up to the versions listed in the public advisory, and it was published by Patchstack in March 2026.

The vulnerable functionality was part of the plugin’s administrator login protection flow. That made the bug more interesting than a normal WordPress issue: the plugin was installed to make admin access safer, but the way it handled the OTP verification path created a separate route into the authentication process.
